text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And with that, race preparations are completed.
Everything has gone as intended.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I should be able to achieve good results at this
rate.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I did not account for is the rate of
my pulse.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No matter my efforts to slow it, my heart always
starts pounding when a race draws near... It's
enough to make me physically shake...
choice_data_list: Channel those nerves into your race!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yes, perhaps that truly is the only way to
calm this feeling.
